changes.body: We will update the “Last updated” date above whenever this policy changes. Material changes will also be announced in the app.
changes.heading: 6. Changes

children.body: Vaquita is not directed at children under 13 and we do not knowingly collect data from them.
children.heading: 5. Children

choices.delete: Email privacy@vaquita.finance to request deletion of profile data.
choices.disconnect: Disconnect your wallet at any time from the Settings screen.
choices.heading: 4. Your choices
choices.hideBalance: Toggle Hide balance in Settings → Privacy settings to mask amounts on screen.

collect.heading: 1. Information we collect
collect.profile: Profile data. Optional nickname and email if you choose to provide them.
collect.usage: Usage data. Aggregated, non-identifying analytics about which screens you visit, used to improve the app.
collect.wallet: Wallet address. When you connect a wallet, we read its public address so we can show your balances and activity.

dont.custody: We do not have custody of your funds or private keys.
dont.heading: 3. What we do NOT do
dont.sell: We do not sell your personal data.
dont.share: We do not share your wallet address with third-party advertisers.

privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information Vaquita collects, how we use it, and the choices you have.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

use.abuse: To detect abuse and keep the Service safe.
use.emails: To send transactional emails or notifications you opted into.
use.heading: 2. How we use information
use.operate: To operate the app, show your savings progress and unlock rewards.

acceptableUse.disrupt: Attempt to disrupt, reverse-engineer or compromise the Service.
acceptableUse.heading: 5. Acceptable use
acceptableUse.impersonate: Misrepresent your identity or impersonate others.
acceptableUse.unlawful: Use the Service for unlawful activity or to evade sanctions.

changes.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will update the “Last updated” date above. Continued use of the Service after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
changes.heading: 8. Changes

disclaimers.body: The Service is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim liability for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
disclaimers.heading: 7. Disclaimers

eligibility.body: You must be at least 18 years old and legally able to enter into a contract in your jurisdiction. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Service is permitted under local law.
eligibility.heading: 2. Eligibility

terms.intro: Welcome to Vaquita. By creating an account, connecting a wallet, or otherwise using the Vaquita app (the “Service”), you agree to these Terms of Service (“Terms”). Please read them carefully.

ip.body: The Vaquita name, logo, vaquita mascot and in-app artwork are owned by us. You receive a limited, non-transferable license to use the Service for personal, non-commercial purposes.
ip.heading: 6. Intellectual property

risks.body: Cryptocurrencies are volatile and smart-contract protocols carry technical and economic risk. Yields, badges, and in-app rewards are not guaranteed and may change at any time. Do not deposit more than you can afford to lose.
risks.heading: 4. Risks

service.body: Vaquita is a gamified savings experience that lets you deposit funds into self-custody smart-contract vaults on supported blockchains. Vaquita is non-custodial: you control your wallet and your funds at all times.
service.heading: 1. The Service

terms.title: Terms of Service

wallet.heading: 3. Your wallet & funds
wallet.irreversible: Blockchain transactions are irreversible. Always double-check before signing.
wallet.noMove: Vaquita can never move funds from your wallet on your behalf.
wallet.security: You are solely responsible for the security of your wallet, keys and recovery phrase.

bank.estimatesDisclaimer: These are estimates and update over time final rewards are confirmed when you withdraw.
bank.howItWorks1: Your deposit generates yield from multiple sources.
bank.howItWorks2: Estimated rewards are calculated using the current APY.
bank.howItWorks3: The APY is dynamic and may fluctuate based on user activity and total deposits.
bank.howItWorks4: Rewards become claimable only after the saving period ends.
bank.howItWorks5: Final rewards are confirmed upon withdrawal.

bank.title: Bank Rewards
bank.vaquitaRewardsInfo: Rewards from the Vaquita community pool, based on your lock period.

feedback.subtitle: Tell us what's working, what isn't, and what you wish Vaquita did.
feedback.successBody: We read every message and we mean it.
feedback.title: Feedback

friends.emptyBody: Check back soon for new vaqueros to follow.
friends.title: Find your friends

apy.a: Your APY is the underlying protocol APY (e.g. lending markets) plus any Vaquita rewards active for your lock period. The breakdown is shown in the home header tap your balance to expand it.

badges.a: Each month we issue badges to vaqueros who completed savings goals. The current-month badge is shown bright; past months that you missed appear locked.

custody.a: No. Vaquita is fully non-custodial. Your funds live in smart contracts and only you, with your wallet keys, can move them. We never see or touch your private keys.

streak.a: Every day you visit the app and have at least one active deposit, your streak grows by 1. Miss a day and the streak resets unless you have a streak-freeze power-up (coming soon).

support.a: Email us at hello@vaquita.finance and we'll get back within 48 hours. Once Feedback ships, you'll be able to send messages right from the app.

what-is.a: Vaquita is a non-custodial savings app that lets you deposit funds into audited DeFi vaults on supported blockchains. We add gamification (streaks, badges, XP) to help you stick to your saving goals.

withdraw.a: If you chose a flexible lock period (0 days), yes. Locked deposits release after their term ends. Withdrawing before the term is not supported in this version.
withdraw.q: Can I withdraw my money anytime?

help.noResultsBody: Try a different keyword or contact us below.

help.title: Help center
